allow: Bash(python -c "from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright; p = sync_playwright\(\).start\(\); b = p.chromium.launch\(\); b.close\(\); p.stop\(\); print\('OK'\)")

PowerShell($missing = @\(\); foreach \($dll in @\("msvcp140.dll","vcruntime140.dll","vcruntime140_1.dll"\)\) { $found = [System.IO.File]::Exists\("C:\\Windows\\System32\\$dll"\); if \(-not $found\) { $missing += $dll } else { Write-Output "OK: $dll" } }; if \($missing\) { Write-Output "MISSING: $\($missing -join ', '\)" })
PowerShell($env:PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH = "C:\\Users\\user\\AppData\\Local\\ms-playwright"; cd "C:\\Users\\user\\Desktop\\Claude Code\\1. 세상학개론 프로젝트"; python fanding_scraper.py 2>&1)

PowerShell($tessdata = "C:\\Program Files\\Tesseract-OCR\\tessdata"; if \(Test-Path "$tessdata\\kor.traineddata"\) { "한국어 데이터 이미 있음" } else { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://github.com/tesseract-ocr/tessdata/raw/main/kor.traineddata" -OutFile "$tessdata\\kor.traineddata"; "한국어 데이터 설치 완료" })
